description: Square graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' template, with a large red diagonal 'HOUSTON' banner across the bottom-right corner. The background is a desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up of handcuffed human hands against a dark torso. The top-left headline is light cyan bold sans-serif 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with the white sub-line '1/26/2025 | Houston, TX.' Large white bold sans-serif reads 'Salvadoran MS-13 Gang Member.' Below is a 'CRIMES:' label with the bulleted charges 'Terrorism' and 'Aggravated assault w/deadly weapon.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark appear at bottom left.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/26/2025 | Houston, TX; Salvadoran MS-13 Gang Member; CRIMES: Terrorism, Aggravated assault w/deadly weapon; HOUSTON; ICE
